scripts.build:electron: cross-env ELECTRON=true vue-tsc && cross-env ELECTRON=true vite build && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('electron/preload.cjs','dist-electron/preload.js')" && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json
scripts.build:electron-dir: cross-env ELECTRON=true vue-tsc && cross-env ELECTRON=true vite build && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('electron/preload.cjs','dist-electron/preload.js')" && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win dir
scripts.build:electron-portable: cross-env ELECTRON=true vue-tsc && cross-env ELECTRON=true vite build && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('electron/preload.cjs','dist-electron/preload.js')" && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win portable
